sections.label: THINKING
sections.content:
Looking at the current state:
- Collected blocks next to player: R (top), b (middle), N (bottom)
- Bottom panel shows: M, R, N, b
The bottom panel shows the order R, N, b. My collected blocks are R, b, N. The order doesn't match - I need R, N, b.
But wait, the blocks are stacked vertically next to the player. The order from top to bottom is R, b, N. The bottom panel shows R, N, b (left to right). Maybe I need to rearrange the collected blocks to match the order in the bottom panel.
But how do I rearrange them? Let me think about what actions are available:
- UP, DOWN, LEFT, RIGHT - movement
- MOUSE - clicking
- ACTION7 - unknown
Maybe ACTION7 does something special. Or maybe I need to click on the blocks to rearrange them.
Actually, let me reconsider. The bottom panel shows the "target" arrangement. The collected blocks next to the player are the "current" arrangement. Maybe I need to make them match.
The current order (top to bottom): R, b, N
The target order (left to right in bottom panel): R, N, b
So I need to swap b and N. But how?
Wait, maybe I should try ACTION7 to see what it does.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# All 3 blocks collected but order is R, b, N (top to bottom)
# Bottom panel shows target: R, N, b (left to right)
# Need to match the order. Let me try ACTION7 to see what it does.

action(['ACTION7'])
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
